response.justification: While the candidate possesses extensive software engineering experience and strong full-stack capabilities, he lacks the deep, recent C++ expertise that is the core requirement for this role. His background is predominantly in web technologies, GIS, and data integration platforms rather than industrial automation machinery, and he does not demonstrate experience with the required industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or specific IoT protocols.
strengths: Over 15 years of software development experience with strong architectural and full-stack capabilities, matching the advantageous React and Node.js skills.
Proven track record in building high-performance, event-driven, and microservices-based architectures.
Demonstrates strong engineering practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and agile methodologies.
concerns: Severe lack of recent and substantial C++ and STL experience, having only used it briefly in 2014-2015.
No evidence of experience with industrial automation, IoT protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, MQTT), or embedded systems integration.
Missing expertise in Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices and IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards.
